modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: UPS battery backup failed during power outage

full_description_text: 
The user called about the UPS. They said it did not work when the power went out. The power supply is showing an alarm. They are not sure why this happened.
short_description: UPS battery backup failed during power outage
description: The user called about the UPS. They said it did not work when the power went out. The power supply is showing an alarm. They are not sure why this happened.
